name: Hazzy
description:
The well known hybrid gootraxian who fucks around with people metaphorically and literally.

This character's theme:

< Fishcracks - Who's Hungry? >

Cafeteria is always surprisingly empty in this facility, which you'd prove a second time to yourself after having to go head there to grab some food, basic human needs and all. Upon sitting down, your lonelines was almost immediately interrupted by this Hazzy...

This picture initially had pizza. Pizza is no more.

(original pic)The credits are also on this pic I think (I can't read what it says).

Tags: Flat, femboyish, gootraxian, latex, cast iron pan, kaiju paradise,
